overall.description: A bus simulator game showing a first-person view from the driver's seat during a heavy rainstorm. The bus navigates through urban streets, stops at bus stops to pick up passengers, and waits at traffic lights while windshield wipers maintain visibility through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection waiting at traffic light

events.description: windshield wipers sweep across windshield clearing heavy rain
traffic light ahead changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: bus driver waiting at red traffic light behind a yellow taxi and red sedan with wipers active

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi waiting at traffic light ahead with brake lights on
red sedan waiting in adjacent lane at intersection

entered.detail: yellow taxi cab with illuminated brake lights stopped at intersection ahead
red passenger car stopped in right lane at traffic light
traffic signal suspended over intersection showing red light
windshield wipers actively sweeping across front window to clear heavy rain
bus driver dashboard with multiple instrument panels and GPS screens
large yellow delivery truck visible through left side window

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a red traffic light during a heavy downpour, positioned behind a yellow taxi and red sedan. Windshield wipers rhythmically clear the rain from the front window while the driver waits for the signal to change. A large yellow truck is visible to the left side of the bus.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection during right turn maneuver

events.description: bus accelerates as light turns green and begins right turn maneuver
completes right turn onto tree-lined street with bus stop visible ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the intersection and executing a right turn onto a residential street lined with trees

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi continues straight ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow pole with bus stop sign indicating passenger pickup zone ahead
covered glass and metal shelter at bus stop for waiting passengers
dense row of green trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: As the traffic light turns green, the bus accelerates through the intersection and executes a wide right turn onto a tree-lined street. The yellow taxi continues straight ahead while the bus approaches a bus stop shelter visible on the right side of the road. Rain continues to fall heavily as the wipers maintain visibility.

events.description: bus pulls over to the curb and comes to a complete stop at designated bus stop
front bus doors open to allow waiting passengers to board
passengers finish boarding and doors prepare to close

agents.ego_description: pulling up to the bus stop curb, opening the doors, and allowing passengers to board the bus

notable_agents.action: passenger in brown shirt and hat entering the bus through front door
second passenger in grey shirt waiting to board at bus shelter

entered.detail: front entry door of bus opening outward to allow passenger access
two people standing at bus stop shelter waiting to board the bus
electronic ticket validation machine visible near driver console

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to a designated stop where two passengers are waiting under a shelter. The front doors open and passengers board the vehicle while rain continues to fall outside. The interior lighting becomes more visible as the doors open, showing the ticket machine and driver console area.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban street in heavy rain

events.description: bus accelerates away from bus stop continuing along the route
passing a large truck traveling in the opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: driving along the wet city street maintaining steady speed with active windshield wipers

notable_agents.action: large truck moving in opposite direction passing the bus on the left side

entered.detail: row of trees and metal fence lining the right side of the street
yellow directional road sign visible in the distance ahead
asphalt road glistening with rainwater and reflecting vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: Having picked up passengers, the bus accelerates along a tree-lined avenue with heavy rain continuing to fall. The vehicle passes a large truck coming from the opposite direction while navigating the wet road surface. Street lamps and road signs are visible through the rain-streaked windshield as the wipers maintain a steady rhythm.

events.description: bus slows down and stops behind white sedan at red traffic light
pedestrian with red umbrella crosses the street in front of the white car ahead

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a stop behind a white sedan at a traffic light near a tall monument

notable_agents.action: white sedan stopped at traffic light with brake lights illuminated
person holding red umbrella crossing the wet street in front of the white car

entered.detail: white passenger car stopped at traffic light with red brake lights glowing
tall stone column monument visible on the left side of the intersection
vertical traffic signal pole at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches an intersection and stops behind a white sedan waiting at a red traffic light. A tall stone monument stands prominently on the left side of the road. A pedestrian with a red umbrella crosses the street in front of the white car while rain continues to pour down and windshield wipers sweep across the glass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-drenched urban environment between two traffic intersections. It begins stationary at a red light behind a yellow taxi and red sedan, with windshield wipers rhythmically clearing a heavy downpour while a large yellow truck sits to the left. As the light turns green, the bus accelerates through the intersection and executes a wide right turn onto a tree-lined street, eventually pulling over at a shelter to board two waiting passengers. The scene then shifts as the bus merges back into traffic, passing an oncoming truck and driving along a wet avenue lined with street lamps and road signs. Finally, the camera comes to a halt behind a white sedan at another red light, where a pedestrian with a red umbrella crosses the street beside a prominent stone monument.
